title: hydrocotyle prolifera
intro: Hydrocotyle prolifera, also known as Indian pennywort or Gotu Kola, is a type of aquatic plant native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve blood circulation, and enhance cognitive function. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle prolifera include its potential to support liver health, improve memory and concentration, and reduce stress and anxiety. Hydrocotyle prolifera is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and extracts, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine.
